prompts: Cinematic shot in a warm, wood-paneled Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall. Ari Ironleaf, an androgynous ranger with a green half-cape and leaf-shaped brooch, stands before the quest board. Ari Ironleaf presents a sealed quest parcel to Ari Silverbrook, a feminine guild coordinator in a formal cloak with a Silverbrook brooch. Both characters are in focus, handoff motion is clear, lively guild activity in the background, no text, no watermark, warm anime lighting.

Continuation of the same scene in the Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall. Ari Silverbrook accepts the sealed parcel from Ari Ironleaf. Both characters perform a polite, slight bow to each other to complete the handoff. The lighting remains warm and consistent with the previous shot, characters maintain their positions and appearances, no text, no watermark, cinematic anime style.
